urdu transliteration text:
Apni markaz pe khada ashq bahayega hussain.
Hussain will remain crying, standing in his place…
Amma jab tak na bulaogi na aega hussain.
english translation text: Until you won’t call him, Hussain will not come to you, O’Mother

urdu transliteration text: Roke sarwar ne kaha ankhe to kholo amma, Itni khamosh ho kyun mujhse to bolo amma,
english translation text:
Imam Hussain cried profusely and said: “Open your eyes, O’Mother…
Please tell me why are you so silent?

urdu transliteration text: Yaad nana ki jo aaeygi to rolo amma, Thak gaee hoto zara der to so lo amma,
english translation text: If you are missing Grandfather (Rasulullah {SAW}), you can cry. If you are tired, you can sleep for a while O’Mother”

urdu transliteration text: Shaq hai aapki ham sab pe judaee amma, Jaan khota hai shahe karbobalaee amma,
english translation text: Separation from you is unbearable for all of us, O’Mother. The King of Karbala is losing his life, O’Mother

urdu transliteration text: Charkh ne kaisi ghadi hamko dikhaee amma, Hamse mat ruthiye nana ki dohaee amma,
english translation text: What a time has destiny shown us, O’Mother? Please do not be upset with us O’ grandfather’s beloved, O’Mother

urdu transliteration text: Mujhse baba ka sisakna nahi dekha jaata,Gham zada bhai ka girya nahi dekha jaata,
english translation text: I am unable to see Baba (Ali AS) weep…I am unable to see my dear brother (Hasan AS) in grief…

urdu transliteration text:
Ab to kulsum ka rona nahi dekha jaata,Mujhse zainab ka tadapna nahi dekha jaata,
I cannot even see Kulsum shed tears… I am unable to see Zainab tremble in grief
Ashq aalooda fiza gham ki ghata chaee hai,Har kali gulshane islam ki murjhaee hai,
english translation text: The entire atmosphere is filled with grief. Every petal from the “garden of Islam” has ceased to blossom

urdu transliteration text: Haye kis mod pe taqdeer hame laee hai,Aale Ahmad pe musibat ki ghadi aaee hai,
english translation text: O’ where has our destiny brought us? The family of Ahmad (SAW) is struck with pain and grief

urdu transliteration text: kaun baba ko masaeb me dilasa dega,Ham gareebo ko bhala kaun sahara dega,
english translation text: Who will console our father (Ali) when he cries? Who will assist us after you have passed?

urdu transliteration text: Behre gam kaise safine ko kinara dega,Dhayaan har haal me yun kaun hamara dega,
english translation text: How will a grief-stricken help someone else? Who will support us at every stage?

urdu transliteration text: Abhi nana ki judaee ka alam taza hai,Furqate rehmate konain ka gham taza hai,
english translation text: The pain due to our grandfather’s (SAW) separation is still fresh. The sadness due to Rasulullah’s (SAW) demise is still fresh

urdu transliteration text: Qalbe muztar me ghame shahe umam taza hai, Ab aseero pe falak ka ye sitam taza hai,
english translation text: The grief of the Prophet’s demise is still fresh in our hearts. Alas, now we still have to go through more tribulations

urdu transliteration text: Sunke muztar ki fugha charkhe kohan kaamp utha, Qalbe konain basad ranj o mehan kaamp utha,
english translation text: Hearing the cries of Hussain (AS), the skies trembled. The Prophet's heart shattered with pain and grief.

urdu transliteration text: Qabr e at-har mai Payambar ka badan kaamp utha, Kehte kehte shahewala ka sokhan kaamp utha,
english translation text: The Prophet’s (SAW) body trembled from his pure grave. Hearing itself, Husain's voice started trembling.

urdu transliteration text:
sunke sarwar ka sokhan bande kafan tut gaya, Ruhe Zehra huee bechain falak kaap gaya,
Hearing Sarwar’s grievances, the shroud tore open… Zahra’s (AS) soul became restless, and the sky trembled
Hath phailake zakiya ne hasan farmaya,Aa gale lagja mere ab na ye kehna beta,
english translation text: Spreading her arms, Fatima (AS) said “O’ my son, please hug me and don’t say this”
